title: allocarya plebeia
intro: Allocarya plebeia, also known as the common allocarya, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Allocarya plebeia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Allocarya plebeia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made from its leaves and roots.
